name: @firstpick/pi-skill-code-security
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for code security reviews, leaked secret checks, dependency risk, unsafe shell/Python/TypeScript/Rust patterns, auth/input-validation flaws, SAST-style audits, or supply-chain concerns in repositories.
description_zh: 代理应调用此技能进行代码安全审查、泄露密钥检查、依赖风险、不安全的 shell/Python/TypeScript/Rust 模式、认证/输入验证缺陷、SAST 风格审计或仓库中的供应链问题
